<!-- forces the text to become bold -->
<bold> bold text </bold>

<!-- forces the text to become plain (not-bold) -->
<plain> plain text </plain>

<!-- paints the text -->
<!-- value: the color to be used (supported formats: #RRGGBB, 0xAARRGGBB) -->
<color value=#RRGGBB> colored text </color>

<!-- makes the text all colorful! -->
<!-- speed: how quickly the colors change -->
<!-- offset: the offset of each letter's color (0-360) -->
<!-- saturation: the saturation of the colors (0.0-1.0) -->
<!-- brightness: the brightness of the colors (0.0-1.0) -->
<rainbow speed=3 offset=30 saturation=1.0 brightness=1.0> rainbow text </rainbow>

<!-- shakes the text -->
<!-- speed: how often each character shakes -->
<!-- intensity: how many pixels should the characters shake -->
<shake speed=1 intensity=5> shakey text </shake>

<!-- makes the text wavey -->
<!-- speed: controls the wave velocity -->
<!-- intensity: maximum pixels a character should move up and down -->
<!-- delay: the delay mult between each character's movement  -->
<wave speed=1 intensity=5 delay=1> wavey text </wave>
